pleading_type.author: Reviewing Attorney
pleading_type.basis: defendant moving to dismiss under Rule 12(b)(6); District Court action; served with a proposed order

motion_relief: dismiss the Pat H. Noe for failure to state a claim upon which relief can be granted
allegations:
Blake B. Poe fails to state a claim upon which relief can be granted.

The written contract attached to the Complaint contains an integration clause that bars the extrinsic representations on which the Plaintiff's allegations depend.

Even accepting the well-pleaded allegations as true, the Complaint does not allege facts establishing each element of a claim for breach of contract.
